stages.concept:
# Unit 128: 관계대명사 that vs. 접속사 that - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **관계대명사 that**과 **접속사 that**의 차이에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **관계대명사 that** — 선행사를 꾸며줌, 관계절에서 주어/목적어 역할

> I read the book **that** was on the table.
> 나는 탁자 위에 있던 책을 읽었다.
> (that = the book → 주어 역할)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **접속사 that** — '~라는 것'을 의미, 절 안에서 문법적 역할 없음

> I know **that** she is kind.
> 나는 그녀가 친절하다는 것을 안다.
> (that은 역할 없이 절을 연결)

👩‍🏫 선생님: 구별 방법:

> 1. **that 뒤가 불완전한 문장** (주어/목적어 빠짐) → **관계대명사**
> 2. **that 뒤가 완전한 문장** → **접속사**

> The book **that** ~~was~~ interesting → was의 주어 빠짐 → 관계대명사
> I think **that** she is smart → she is smart (완전) → 접속사

> This is the cake **that** she made ~~(it)~~ → 목적어 빠짐 → 관계대명사
> I believe **that** he will come → he will come (완전) → 접속사

**Q. 다음 밑줄 친 that의 역할이 나머지 둘과 '다른' 하나를 고르세요.**
1. The man <u>that</u> lives next door is friendly. (that 뒤 '주어'가 빠짐 - 관계대명사)
2. She bought the shoes <u>that</u> she wanted. (that 뒤 '목적어'가 빠짐 - 관계대명사)
3. He said <u>that</u> he was tired. (that 뒤 '완전문장' - 접속사) ✅ 

👩‍🏫 선생님: 정확해요! that 뒤에 완전한 문장이 오고, 바로 앞에 동사(said)가 있어서 목적절의 역할을 하는 that은 **접속사**랍니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: that 뒤가 불완전하면 관계대명사, 완전하면 접속사! 핵심 구별법이네요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 128: 관계대명사 that vs. 접속사 that - 연습문제 A

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분이 해당하는 것을 고르시오.
She told me that I have to study hard. (     )
> **정답** 접속사

---

**02.** The book that I read yesterday was fun. ?
> **정답** 관계대명사

---

**03.** I know that he is a good person. ?
> **정답** 접속사

---

**04.** The girl that I met was kind. ?
> **정답** 관계대명사

---

**05.** I believe that she will come. ?
> **정답** 접속사

---

**06.** 다음 문장에서 that의 역할을 고르시오.
The man that helped me was kind.
> **정답** 관계대명사

---

**07.** I think that he is smart.
> **정답** 접속사

---

**08.** The movie that we watched was great.
> **정답** 관계대명사

---

**09.** She said that she was tired.
> **정답** 접속사

---

**10.** The cake that my mom made was delicious.
> **정답** 관계대명사

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 그가 학생이라는 것을 안다. (접속사)
I know he is a student.
> **정답** that

---

**12.** 내가 읽은 책은 재미있었다. (관계대명사)
The book I read was fun.
> **정답** that

---

**13.** 그녀가 올 것이라고 믿는다. (접속사)
I believe she will come.
> **정답** that

---

**14.** 나를 도와준 사람은 친절했다. (관계대명사)
The person helped me was kind.
> **정답** that

---

**15.** 그는 피곤하다고 말했다. (접속사)
He said he was tired.
> **정답** that

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나는 그녀가 착하다는 것을 안다. (접속사)
know I that she is kind
> **정답** I / know / that / she / is / kind

---

**17.** 내가 산 가방은 빨간색이다. (관계대명사)
The bag that bought I is red
> **정답** The / bag / that / I / bought / is / red

---

**18.** 그가 올 것이라고 생각한다. (접속사)
think I that he will come
> **정답** I / think / that / he / will / come

---

**19.** 내가 만난 소녀는 예뻤다. (관계대명사)
The girl that met I was pretty
> **정답** The / girl / that / I / met / was / pretty

---

**20.** 그녀는 배고프다고 말했다. (접속사)
said She that she was hungry
> **정답** She / said / that / she / was / hungry
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 128: 관계대명사 that vs. 접속사 that - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
A: I know ______________ he will be our homeroom
teacher.
B: Who? You mean Mr. Brown _________________
taught us math last year?
what
that
who
whom
> **정답** that

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
The police officer _________ I knew was investigating
the crime.
He told us ________ we should stay away from the
area.
who - which
that - that
that - which
whose - that
> **정답** that - that

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
It is clear ________________ she will promote Tom.
Tom is a young man ______________ performs better
than any other worker.
which - who
that - who
that - whose
that - whom
> **정답** that - who

---

**04.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을
고르시오.
<보기> She thinks that her mom will be mad at her
results.
That the Earth is round is wide-spread fact.
Mrs. Kim that doesn't get along with
neighbors will leave the town.
I was looking for a paper that I completed a
week ago.
Tom's birthday that was already past was
his favorite day.
> **정답** That the Earth is round is wide-spread fact.

---

**05.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을
고르시오.
<보기> Amy visited a museum that was built last year.
They all heard that the thief ran away from
prison.
Tom's son that entered a noted university
sent her a letter.
I was disappointed to hear that she left
without saying goodbye.
His point was that we all should wake up
earlier.
> **정답** Tom's son that entered a noted university sent her
a letter.

---

**06.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 다른 것을
고르시오.
<보기> Amy's point was that she couldn't finish it
alone.
She knew that her mother would not allow
her to go out at night.
Last night, I dreamed that I was in Rome.
Tom searched for something that could give
him a better idea.
Amy realized that she might be wrong.
> **정답** Tom searched for something that could give him a
better idea.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. (3개)
나는 Amy가 추천한 호텔에 머물렀다.
I stayed at a hotel Amy recommended.
I stayed at a hotel that Amy recommended.
I stayed at a hotel whose Amy
recommended.
I stayed at a hotel which Amy
recommended.
> **정답** I stayed at a hotel Amy recommended., I stayed at
a hotel that Amy recommended., I stayed at a hotel
which Amy recommended.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 소년은 엄마에게 10시까지 집에 돌아오겠다고 말했다.
The boy told mom and he would be back by 10
o'clock.
The boy told mom that would be back by 10
o'clock.
The boy told mom that he would be back by
10 o'clock.
> **정답** The boy told mom that he would be back by
10 o'clock.

---

**09.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을
고르시오.
<보기> It was surprising that Amy won the first prize
in the song contest.
I participated in the meeting that was held on
13th floor.
The food that she prepared for me was
amazing.
I heard that Tom decided to quit his job.
They presented some documents that
explained business plan.
> **정답** I heard that Tom decided to quit his job.

---

**10.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을
고르시오.
<보기> She is looking for a solution that can solve
everything.
The problem is that we are running out of
time.
Amy found a piece of broken glass that
could hurt anyone.
I heard that Tom was sent to a hospital last
night.
Tom told his mom that he might come late
today.
> **정답** Amy found a piece of broken glass that could hurt
anyone.

---

**11.** 다음 문장에서 선행사를 고르시오.
① I told ② the woman that ③ someone was looking
for ④her. ⑤ 없음
> **정답** 5

---

**12.** 다음 문장에서 선행사를 고르시오.
① Tom talked with ② his cousin that came to visit ③
him from ④ another town. ⑤ 없음
> **정답** 2

---

**13.** 다음 문장에서 선행사를 고르시오.
① Tom spread ② the news that ③ he heard from ④
his mom. ⑤ 없음
> **정답** 2

---

**14.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Amy thinks which she will
be the next head student.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → that

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
It is true what he didn't
tell a lie.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** what → that

---

**16.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 다른 것을
고르시오.
<보기> Tom heard that his friend would transfer to
another school.
The woman that I met was a famous singer.
I know that he is innocent.
Please make sure that you turn off the
computer when you leave.
I think that Tom is the best basketball player.
> **정답** The woman that I met was a famous singer.

---

**17.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 다른 것을
고르시오.
<보기> This is the bus that I am waiting for.
I need a friend that I can play with.
I have a daughter that studies in Los Angeles.
I am sure that Tom didn't take the test.
Did you see the puppy that is sleeping in the
kitchen?
> **정답** I am sure that Tom didn't take the test.

---

**18.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을
고르시오.
<보기> The problem is that the workers in this
company are often late to work.
The dog that I saw at the mall was so cute.
I posted some pictures that I took in Chicago.
Look at the boy that is singing on the stage.
We know that the Earth moves around the
Sun.
> **정답** We know that the Earth moves around the Sun.

---

**19.** 다음 중 관계대명사 that을 모두 고르시오.
I was going to meet my friend ①that lives close to my
house. We planned to go see a musical ②that we
wanted to see. But I didn't feel well. I told my mom
③that I felt sick. Mom told me ④that I should just
stay home and rest. I called my friend and said ⑤that
I couldn't come.
> **정답** 1, 2

---

**20.** 다음 중 접속사 that을 모두 고르시오.
Amy thought ①that her friends all wanted to come to
her birthday party. So, she sent everyone the
invitation cards ②that she made with her sister. But
the next day, she heard ③that some of her friends
didn't want to come to the party. She asked them the
reason. They said ④that they had homework of
which the deadline was the next day. She felt sad to
hear they couldn't come to her party.
> **정답** 1, 3, 4
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 128 관계대명사 that vs. 접속사 that중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** that과 주어진 말을 이용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀에게 너가 그녀를 좋아한다고 말했니?
힌트 (     ) like
Did you tell her  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) (     )
정답 that, you, like, her

---

**02.** that과 주어진 말을 이용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
너는 세계에서 유명한 연예인을 만난적이 있니?
힌트 (     ) famous
Have you ever met a celebrity  (     )   (     )  
in the world?
정답 that, is, famous

---

**03.** that과 주어진 말을 이용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀는 그가 아프다는 것을 믿지 않았다.
힌트 (     ) sick
She didn't believe  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 that, he, was, sick

---

**04.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐쓰시오.
나는 Peter가 날마다 걸어서 학교에 간다는 것을 안다.
I know what Peter walk to school every day.
→ I know  (     )  every
day.
정답 that Peter walks to school

---

**05.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐쓰시오.
그는 우리 집을 처음 방문했던 사람이었다.
He was the first person who visit my house.
→ He was the first person
.
정답 that visited my house

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
그녀는 내게 밖에서 기다려야 한다고 말했다.
힌트 (     ) should, I, outside, that, wait
She told me  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 that, I, should, wait, outside

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
사실 그는 내가 전에 본적이 있는 사람이다.
힌트 (     ) have, before, that, I, seen
In fact, he is the person  (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 that, I, have, seen, before

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
사장이 회의에 참석할 거라는 소식은 사람들을 놀래켰다.
힌트 (     ) boss, that, participate, the, will
The news  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  in
the meeting surprised everyone.
정답 that, the, boss, will, participate

---

**09.** 접속사 that을 이용하여 우리말을 영어로 쓰시오.
나는 그녀가 병원에 있다고 들었다.
힌트 (     ) be, in hospital
I heard  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 that, she, was, in, hospital

---

**10.** 관계대명사 that을 이용하여 우리말을 영어로 쓰시오.
Mr. Lee는 학생들이 존경하는 선생님이다.
힌트 (     ) a teacher, admire
Mr. Lee is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 a, teacher, that, students, admire

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 128: 관계대명사 that vs. 접속사 that - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
A: I know ______________ she will be our class president.
B: Who?
You mean Amy _________________ helped us in math last semester? what that who whom
> 정답: that

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The teacher _________ I knew was checking the homework.
She told us ________ we should submit it by Friday.
who - which that - that that - which whose - that
> 정답: that - that

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
It is obvious ________________ he will choose Amy.
Amy is a student ______________ studies harder than anyone else.
which - who that - who that - whose that - whom
> 정답: that - who

---

**04.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> He thinks that his dad will be proud of his results.
That the sun rises in the east is a well-known fact.
Ms. Park that doesn't get along with students will leave the school.
I was looking for a pen that I left on my desk a week ago.
Tom's birthday that was already past was his happiest day.
> 정답: That the sun rises in the east is a well-known fact.

---

**05.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Amy visited a museum that was opened last month.
They all heard that the bird flew away from the cage.
Tom's sister that entered a famous university sent him a card.
I was disappointed to hear that he left without finishing.
His point was that we all should try harder.
> 정답: Tom's sister that entered a famous university sent him

---

**06.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Tom's idea was that he couldn't do it alone.
She knew that her teacher would not let her retake the test.
Last night, I dreamed that I was in Tokyo.
Amy searched for something that could give her a better idea. better score.
Kevin realized that he might be late.
> 정답: Amy searched for something that could give her a better idea.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(3개) 나는 Amy가 추천한 카페에 갔다.
I went to a café Amy recommended.
I went to a café that Amy recommended.
I went to a café whose Amy recommended.
I went to a café which Amy recommended.
> 정답: I went to a café Amy recommended., I went to a café that Amy recommended.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 소녀는 엄마에게 9시까지 집에 돌아오겠다고 말했다.
The girl told mom and she would be back by 9 o'clock.
The girl told mom that would be back by 9 o'clock.
The girl told mom that she would be back by 9 o'clock.
The girl told mom she that would be back by 9 o'clock.
> 정답: The girl told mom that she would be back by 9

---

**09.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> It was amazing that Tom won first place in the writing contest.
I attended the meeting that was held on the 2nd floor.
The food that she prepared for us was delicious.
I heard that Amy decided to change schools.
They showed some slides that explained the project.
> 정답: I heard that Amy decided to change schools.

---

**10.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> He is looking for a solution that can fix everything.
The issue is that we are running out of space.
Amy found a piece of rope that could tie anything.
I heard that Tom was taken to a hospital last night.
Kevin told his mom that he might be late today.
> 정답: Amy found a piece of rope that could tie anything.

---

**11.** 다음 문장에서 선행사를 고르시오.
① I told ② the boy that ③ someone was looking for ④him. ⑤ 없음
